tools.name: reliability_preflight
tools.description: Find false-green risk by linting agent claims against evidence, freshness, and external-receipt requirements; returns a signed Corbelworks action receipt.

tools.name: purchase_agent_reliability_scan
tools.description: Get the fixed $149 Stripe checkout link for an Agent Reliability + Action-Receipt Scan; the signed link receipt explicitly records payment_status=not_paid.

tools.name: verify_action_receipt
tools.description: Verify a Corbelworks Ed25519 action receipt, payload digest, and signature against the published public key.
